Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Annotation Interface RdfConfig

@Target({TYPE,METHOD}) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Inherited @ContextApply({SerializerApply.class,ParserApply.class}) public @interface RdfConfig
Annotation for specifying config properties defined in XmlSerializer, XmlDocSerializer, and XmlParser.

Used primarily for specifying bean configuration properties on REST classes and methods.

See Also:
  • {doc jmr.RdfDetails}

  • Element Details

    • addBeanTypes

      String addBeanTypes
      Add "_type" properties when needed. If "true", then "_type" properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred through reflection.

      When present, this value overrides the Serializer.Builder.addBeanTypes() setting and is provided to customize the behavior of specific serializers in a SerializerSet.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • Serializer.Builder.addBeanTypes()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • addLiteralTypes

      String addLiteralTypes
      Add XSI data types to non-String literals.
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.addLiteralTypes()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • addRootProperty

      String addRootProperty
      Add RDF root identifier property to root node.

      When enabled an RDF property http://www.apache.org/juneau/root is added with a value of "true" to identify the root node in the graph.
      This helps locate the root node during parsing.

      If disabled, the parser has to search through the model to find any resources without incoming predicates to identify root notes, which can introduce a considerable performance degradation.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.addRootProperty()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • collectionFormat

      String collectionFormat
      RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
      • "DEFAULT" - Default format. The default is an RDF Sequence container.
      • "SEQ" - RDF Sequence container.
      • "BAG" - RDF Bag container.
      • "LIST" - RDF List container.
      • "MULTI_VALUED" - Multi-valued properties.
      Notes:
      • If you use "BAG" or "MULTI_VALUED", the order of the elements in the collection will get lost.
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat)
      • RdfParser.Builder.collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • disableAutoDetectNamespaces

      String disableAutoDetectNamespaces
      Disable auto-detect namespace usage.

      Don't detect namespace usage before serialization.

      If disabled, then the data structure will first be crawled looking for namespaces that will be encountered before the root element is serialized.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.disableAutoDetectNamespaces()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • disableUseXmlNamespaces

      String disableUseXmlNamespaces
      Disable reuse of XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.

      When specified, namespaces defined using @XmlNs and @Xml will be inherited by the RDF serializers.
      Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using @RdfNs and @Rdf.

      • "true"
      • "false" (default)
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.disableUseXmlNamespaces()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • juneauBpNs

      String juneauBpNs
      Default XML namespace for bean properties.
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.juneauBpNs(Namespace)
      • RdfParser.Builder.juneauBpNs(Namespace)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • juneauNs

      String juneauNs
      XML namespace for Juneau properties.
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.juneauNs(Namespace)
      • RdfParser.Builder.juneauNs(Namespace)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • language

      String language
      RDF language.

      The RDF language to use.

      • "RDF/XML"
      • "RDF/XML-ABBREV" (default)
      • "N-TRIPLE"
      • "N3" - General name for the N3 writer. Will make a decision on exactly which writer to use (pretty writer, plain writer or simple writer) when created. Default is the pretty writer but can be overridden with system property org.apache.jena.n3.N3JenaWriter.writer.
      • "N3-PP" - Name of the N3 pretty writer. The pretty writer uses a frame-like layout, with prefixing, clustering like properties and embedding one-referenced bNodes.
      • "N3-PLAIN" - Name of the N3 plain writer. The plain writer writes records by subject.
      • "N3-TRIPLES" - Name of the N3 triples writer. This writer writes one line per statement, like N-Triples, but does N3-style prefixing.
      • "TURTLE" - Turtle writer. http://www.dajobe.org/2004/01/turtle/
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.language(String)
      • RdfParser.Builder.language(String)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • looseCollections

      String looseCollections
      Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.

      When specified, collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).

      Note that this setting is specialized for RDF syntax, and is incompatible with the concept of losslessly representing POJO models, since the tree structure of these POJO models are lost when serialized as loose collections.

      This setting is typically only useful if the beans being parsed into do not have a bean property annotated with @Rdf(beanUri=true).

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.looseCollections()
      • RdfParser.Builder.looseCollections()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri

      String n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri
      N3/Turtle property: disableAbbrevBaseURI.

      Controls whether to use abbreviations <> or <#>.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri()
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_disableObjectLists

      String n3_disableObjectLists
      N3/Turtle property: disableObjectLists.

      Don't print object lists as comma separated lists.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_disableObjectLists()
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_disableObjectLists()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_disableUseDoubles

      String n3_disableUseDoubles
      N3/Turtle property: disableUseDoubles.

      Disallow the use doubles as 123.456.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_disableUseDoubles()
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_disableUseDoubles()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_disableUsePropertySymbols

      String n3_disableUsePropertySymbols
      N3/Turtle property: disableUsePropertySymbols.

      Controls whether to use a, = and => in output

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_disableUsePropertySymbols()
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_disableUsePropertySymbols()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings

      String n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings
      N3/Turtle property: disableUseTripleQuotedStrings.

      Disallow the use of """ to delimit long strings.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings()
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_indentProperty

      String n3_indentProperty
      N3/Turtle property: indentProperty.

      Width to indent properties.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_indentProperty(int)
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_indentProperty(int)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_minGap

      String n3_minGap
      N3/Turtle property: minGap.

      Minimum gap between items on a line.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_minGap(int)
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_minGap(int)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_propertyColumn

      String n3_propertyColumn
      N3/Turtle property: propertyColumn.

      Width of the property column.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_propertyColumn(int)
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_propertyColumn(int)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_subjectColumn

      String n3_subjectColumn
      N3/Turtle property: subjectColumn.

      If the subject is shorter than this value, the first property may go on the same line.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_subjectColumn(int)
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_subjectColumn(int)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • n3_widePropertyLen

      String n3_widePropertyLen
      N3/Turtle property: widePropertyLen.

      Width of the property column.
      Must be longer than propertyColumn.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.n3_widePropertyLen(int)
      • RdfParser.Builder.n3_widePropertyLen(int)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • namespaces

      String[] namespaces
      Default namespaces.

      The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.namespaces(Namespace...)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      {}

    • rank

      int rank
      Optional rank for this config.

      Can be used to override default ordering and application of config annotations.

      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      0

    • rdfxml_allowBadUris

      String rdfxml_allowBadUris
      RDF/XML property: allowBadURIs.

      URIs in the graph are, by default, checked prior to serialization.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_allowBadUris()
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_allowBadUris()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar

      String rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar
      RDF/XML property: attributeQuoteChar.

      The XML attribute quote character.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar(char)
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar(char)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_blockRules

      String rdfxml_blockRules
      RDF/XML property: blockRules.

      A list of Resource or a String being a comma separated list of fragment IDs from {doc http://www.w3.org/TR/rdf-syntax-grammar RDF Syntax Grammar} indicating grammar rules that will not be used.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_blockRules(String)
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_blockRules(String)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration

      String rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration
      RDF/XML property: disableShowDoctypeDeclaration.

      If true, an XML doctype declaration isn't included in the output.
      This declaration includes a !ENTITY declaration for each prefix mapping in the model, and any attribute value that starts with the URI of that mapping is written as starting with the corresponding entity invocation.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration()
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_embedding

      String rdfxml_embedding
      RDF/XML ARP property: embedding.

      Sets ARP to look for RDF embedded within an enclosing XML document.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setEmbedding(boolean) ARPOptions.setEmbedding(boolean)}
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_errorMode

      String rdfxml_errorMode
      RDF/XML ARP property: error-mode.

      This allows a coarse-grained approach to control of error handling.

      • "default"
      • "lax"
      • "strict"
      • "strict-ignore"
      • "strict-warning"
      • "strict-error"
      • "strict-fatal"
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setDefaultErrorMode() ARPOptions.setDefaultErrorMode()}
      • {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setLaxErrorMode() ARPOptions.setLaxErrorMode()}
      • {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode() ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode()}
      • {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode(int) ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode(int)}
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_iriRules

      String rdfxml_iriRules
      RDF/XML property: iri_rules.

      Set the engine for checking and resolving.

      • "lax" - The rules for RDF URI references only, which does permit spaces although the use of spaces is not good practice.
      • "strict" - Sets the IRI engine with rules for valid IRIs, XLink and RDF; it does not permit spaces in IRIs.
      • "iri" - Sets the IRI engine to IRI ({doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3986.txt RFC 3986}, {doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3987.txt RFC 3987}).
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_longId

      String rdfxml_longId
      RDF/XML property: longId.

      Whether to use long ID's for anon resources.
      Short ID's are easier to read, but can run out of memory on very large models.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_longId()
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_longId()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_relativeUris

      String rdfxml_relativeUris
      RDF/XML property: relativeURIs.

      What sort of relative URIs should be used.

      A comma separate list of options:

      • "same-document" - Same-document references (e.g. "" or "#foo")
      • "network" - Network paths (e.g. "//example.org/foo" omitting the URI scheme)
      • "absolute" - Absolute paths (e.g. "/foo" omitting the scheme and authority)
      • "relative" - Relative path not beginning in "../"
      • "parent" - Relative path beginning in "../"
      • "grandparent" - Relative path beginning in "../../"

      The default value is "same-document, absolute, relative, parent". To switch off relative URIs use the value "". Relative URIs of any of these types are output where possible if and only if the option has been specified.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_relativeUris(String)
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_relativeUris(String)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration

      String rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration
      RDF/XML property: showXmlDeclaration.
      • "true" - Add XML Declaration to the output.
      • "false" - Don't add XML Declaration to the output.
      • "default" - Only add an XML Declaration when asked to write to an OutputStreamWriter that uses some encoding other than UTF-8 or UTF-16. In this case the encoding is shown in the XML declaration.
      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration(String)
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration(String)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_tab

      String rdfxml_tab
      RDF/XML property: tab.

      The number of spaces with which to indent XML child elements.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_tab(int)
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_tab(int)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • rdfxml_xmlBase

      String rdfxml_xmlBase
      RDF/XML property: xmlbase.

      The value to be included for an xml:base attribute on the root element in the file.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.rdfxml_xmlbase(String)
      • RdfParser.Builder.rdfxml_xmlbase(String)
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""

    • trimWhitespace

      String trimWhitespace
      Trim whitespace from text elements.

      If "true", whitespace in text elements will be automatically trimmed.

      Notes:
      • Supports VarResolver.DEFAULT (e.g. "$C{myConfigVar}").
      See Also:
      • RdfParser.Builder.trimWhitespace()
      Returns:
      The annotation value.
      Default:
      ""
